check_in_message.message:
<Hi Aria,

I hope this message finds you well! I wanted to check in on the progress of our 'Neon Letters' single and make sure everything is coming together smoothly. We're just days away from the release, so it's crucial that we finalize any last touches. Can you confirm your preferences for the cover art by March 18th? Looking forward to seeing how it all comes together!

Best,
The Label Owner>
check_in_message.tone_notes: <Warm and direct message, emphasizing the importance of the final touches and setting a clear deadline>

action_items.action: Send final mastered WAV + ISRC confirmation to Aria
